mobile.title: Pick your next corner of InkVerse

footer.summary: A reading multiverse for original stories, wild fanfiction, and the people who love getting lost in both.

card.title: InkVerse demo is open.
card.text: Browse live books, test ranking and moderation flows, and keep an eye out for the upcoming author experience.
card.note: Author tools, profiles, and more are on the roadmap.

bottom.tagline: Built for readers who stay one chapter too long.

legal.signIn: By continuing, you agree to InkVerse's <0>Terms of Service</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
legal.register: By creating an account, you agree to InkVerse's <0>Terms of Service</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>.

aside.title: Step back into your shelf.
aside.text: Sign in to keep reading, save what matters, and rejoin the stories already waiting for you.

features.title: Save your shelf
features.text: Keep your bookmarks, library picks, and reader profile synced in one place.

features.title: Join the live discourse
features.text: Leave reviews, react to stories, and follow the books climbing fast.

features.title: Carry one reader identity
features.text: Move across original stories, AU worlds, and fanfic lanes without losing your place.

form.title: Enter InkVerse
form.text: Use your reader details to pick up right where you left off.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid username, email, or password. Please try again.
errors.validLoginInput: Enter a valid username or email address.
errors.generic400: Login failed. Please check your information.
errors.reviewFields: Please review the fields and try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

aside.title: Build a reader pass that travels with you.
aside.text: We only need a few clean details to open your spot inside InkVerse.

form.title: Create your InkVerse account
form.text: Set up a reader identity for reviews, saved books, rankings, and your personal library.
form.successText: Sign in with your new credentials and start shaping your shelf.
form.usernameHelper: 3 to 20 characters, starting with a letter. Letters, numbers, and underscores only.
form.passwordHelper: Use 8+ characters with upper, lower, number, and symbol.
form.successCardText: Your reader account is live. You can sign in now with your new username and password, or continue with Google whenever you like.

rules.firstNameLength: First name has at least 2 characters
rules.lastNameLength: Last name has at least 2 characters
rules.usernameCharset: Username uses letters, numbers, or underscores

errors.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Try another one.
errors.emailTaken: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.bothTaken: Both the username and email are already in use.
errors.generic400: Registration failed. Please check your information.
errors.reviewFields: Please review the form details and make sure every requirement is met.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

hero.title: Fall into the kinds of stories people actually obsess over.
hero.subtitle: Discover new originals, wild fanfiction, and the latest reader buzz in one curated landing space built for exploration.
hero.posterText: Big feelings. Sharp worlds. One more chapter.

newBooks.title: New on InkVerse
newBooks.subtitle: Fresh shelves, new obsessions, and the latest worlds added to the platform.

trends.title: Trending Concepts
trends.subtitle: Follow the moods, themes, and ideas that are pulling readers in right now.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Discover the most popular themes and story worlds readers love.
tags.directoryText: Tap any tag to jump straight into matching books.
tags.visualHint: Explore dense shelves of themes, moods, and story hooks readers keep chasing.

topBooks.title: Top Books
topBooks.subtitle: The most-read stories across Original, AU, and Fan-Fiction.

recentReviews.title: Recent Reviews
recentReviews.subtitle: What readers are saying right now.

statusCopy.Reading: Still in motion, with your next reading session waiting right where you left it.
statusCopy.Completed: Finished, kept close, and ready for a revisit whenever the mood comes back.
statusCopy.Planned: Queued on your shelf for the next time you want something new without searching again.
statusCopy.Dropped: Set aside for now, but still close enough to return if the story pulls you back in.

page.errorSubtitle: Please try loading your shelf again.
page.searchEmptySubtitle: Try a different title search or switch to another shelf lane.
page.emptySubtitle: Move books between lanes, or come back after adding more stories.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Catalog health, moderation, and publishing at a glance.

books.title: Books
books.subtitle: Manage titles, taxonomy, and chapter entry points.

characters.title: Character Bank
characters.subtitle: Build reusable fandom character templates and connect them to matching books.

newBook.title: New Book
newBook.subtitle: Create a new title and prepare it for publishing.

newChapter.title: New Chapter
newChapter.subtitle: Draft a chapter and place it in the right arc.

editChapter.title: Edit Chapter
editChapter.subtitle: Update chapter content, numbering, and arc placement.

chapters.title: Chapters
chapters.subtitle: Organize arcs, import batches, and keep chapter order clean.

editBook.title: Edit Book
editBook.subtitle: Update metadata, cover art, and discovery settings.

trends.title: Trends
trends.subtitle: Curate spotlight collections and connected books.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Keep reader-facing tags clean, searchable, and active.

genres.title: Genres
genres.subtitle: Manage the shelf structure readers browse by.

visualAssets.title: Visual assets
visualAssets.subtitle: Control fixed page artwork slots and crop them inside their frames.

layout.sidebarCopy: Books, moderation, taxonomy, and trend curation in one place.

common.sidebarTagline: Write, organize, and grow your shelf.
common.noSynopsisDetail: No synopsis yet. Add one from the story detail page.

onboarding.title: Open a calmer writing desk for your stories.
onboarding.text: Build your author space, then step into it in one clean move.
onboarding.signInBecomeAuthor: Sign in to become an author
onboarding.workspaceText: Drafts, arcs, covers, and books stay in one calm lane.
onboarding.readerPulseText: Watch views, ratings, and return signals without noisy clutter.
onboarding.publishingText: Move chapters from draft to release with a cleaner rhythm.
onboarding.identityText: Build a studio that feels made for your worlds, not for admin work.

terms.title: Activate your Author Studio access
terms.text: This temporary agreement confirms ownership, publishing rights, and platform standards before author tools are opened on your account.
terms.ownershipText: You confirm that you own or can publish the stories you upload.
terms.standardsText: You agree to platform rules, moderation, and quality expectations.
terms.monetizationText: You accept that payout and program terms can be expanded later.
terms.agree: I agree to the current author terms and contract placeholder.
terms.upgradeError: Could not upgrade your account right now.

dashboard.coverMissing: Add a cover so the shelf feels complete.
dashboard.synopsisMissing: Add a short promise for readers.
dashboard.chaptersReady: Chapters are connected to this story.
dashboard.chaptersMissing: Create the first chapter when you are ready.
dashboard.noStoriesSubtitle: Create a story in Workspace and this dashboard will become your author home.
dashboard.performanceText: No daily reader history is recorded yet. Current totals are shown above from your book records.

workspace.title: Your story shelf
workspace.subtitle: Search, open, and manage the books you are actively building.
workspace.noBooksEmpty: Create your first book to get started.
workspace.noSynopsisRow: No synopsis yet. Open this story to refine its details.
workspace.deleteConfirm: Delete this book? This action cannot be undone.
workspace.createSubtitle: Set the main story details first, then shape the cover and discovery signals.

errors.image: Could not load this image file.
errors.title: Book name is required.

book.subtitle: Manage the book profile, then move between drafts, published chapters, and trash.
book.contractSubtitle: Only approved contracted books can mark chapters as paid and earn royalties.
book.contractApprovedNote: This book is approved for paid chapters.
book.contractReviewNote: This book meets the contract standards and is waiting for admin review.
book.chapterBoardTitle: Keep chapter progress easy to scan
book.chapterBoardDescription: Switch between drafts, published chapters, and trash without leaving the book.
book.chaptersAppear: Chapters will appear here once available.
book.newVolumeSubtitle: Create a new volume (arc) for this book.
book.adjustVolumeSubtitle: Drag and drop to reorder volumes.

errors.image: Could not load this image file.
errors.locked: Published chapters are locked after contract approval.
errors.contractNeeded: This book needs an approved contract before chapters can be paid.
errors.postContractOnly: Only chapters created after contract approval can be paid.
errors.deleteArcPartial: Deleted arc, but {{count}} chapter(s) could not be moved to trash.

chapterEditor.subtitle: Draft calmly, save locally, and preview the reading flow before publishing.
chapterEditor.draftSaveFailed: Failed to save draft on this browser.
chapterEditor.needsContract: Approved contract required for paid chapters.
chapterEditor.needsAgreement: Accept monetization terms before paid chapters.
chapterEditor.teaserPlaceholder: Optional locked-chapter teaser. If empty, InkVerse will use the opening excerpt.
chapterEditor.previewEmpty: Chapter content preview will appear here.

wish.giftText: Your gift is the motivation for my creation. Give me more motivation!
wish.voteText: Creation is hard, cheer me up!
wish.tagText: I tagged this book, come and support me with a thumbs up!
wish.commentText: Have some idea about my story? Comment it and let me know.

income.title: Your royalties, holds, and payout requests.
income.subtitle: Paid chapter earnings enter a 14-day hold, then become available for withdrawal or future creator services.
income.pendingNote: Pending royalties mature automatically when viewed.
income.payoutDescription: The provider is still an adapter, so this records the request for later fulfillment.
income.payoutHistoryDescription: Requests are held here until a provider adapter is connected.
income.noPayoutSubtitle: Available earnings can be requested anytime.
income.bookRevenueDescription: Paid chapter unlocks add author royalties here.
income.noRoyaltiesSubtitle: Paid chapter unlocks will appear here.

contract.title: Activate monetization before earning royalties.
contract.subtitle: This v1 agreement records the economic rules the app now enforces: paid chapters, royalty holds, AI service rights, and payout requests.
contract.stateDescription: Authors must accept this before serious paid rollout.
contract.legalReview: Production legal text still needs lawyer review before launch.
contract.royaltySplitText: Authors earn 75% of net paid chapter revenue.
contract.holdPeriodText: Royalties stay pending for 14 days before withdrawal.
contract.readerAiText: Translation and TTS are platform services on admin-approved books.

storyStudio.runError: Could not run Story Studio tool.
storyStudio.chooseChapter: Choose one chapter before running proofreading.
storyStudio.title: Plan plots, analyze characters, and keep the book brain private.
storyStudio.subtitle: Outputs save into a private Book Notebook. Nothing edits your chapters directly.
storyStudio.contextDescription: Select only the chapters the tool should use so costs stay controlled.
storyStudio.promptPlaceholder: What should the AI focus on?
storyStudio.notebookDescription: Private AI notes and manual notes for this book.
storyStudio.noNotebookSubtitle: Run a Story Studio tool to save the first note.

plotPlanner.label: Plot planner
plotPlanner.text: Structure promises, turns, crisis, and payoff.

nextPlot.label: Next plot suggestions
nextPlot.text: Find the next complication, reveal, or character choice.

characterAnalysis.label: Character analysis
characterAnalysis.text: Pressure-test motives, fear, contradiction, and arc.

continuityCheck.label: Continuity checker
continuityCheck.text: Catch timeline, power-rule, and unresolved setup issues.

worldbuildingNotes.label: Worldbuilding notes
worldbuildingNotes.text: Organize rules, factions, locations, and contradictions.

bookBible.saveProfileError: Could not save Book Bible profile.
bookBible.quoteError: Could not quote Book Bible Sync.
bookBible.suggestionError: Could not create Book Bible suggestions.
bookBible.title: Build the private canon map
bookBible.description: Keep the story brain structured before it turns into sticky notes everywhere.
bookBible.scanNote: Chapters changed since the last scan. Run Book Bible Sync when you want AI suggestions.
bookBible.premiseDescription: This is the high-level direction the rest of the bible can orbit around.
bookBible.syncDescription: Select context, get a quote, then save suggestions into the pending queue.
bookBible.worldDescription: Locations, factions, rules, systems, cultures, history, and key objects.
bookBible.name: Name
bookBible.noWorldSubtitle: Add the first rule, place, faction, or system.
bookBible.characterDescription: Track motive, fear, goal, secrets, and arc movement.
bookBible.noCharactersSubtitle: Add the first character to start the relationship map.
bookBible.relationshipDescription: A lightweight map of pressure, loyalty, rivalry, and change.
bookBible.plotDescription: Track promises, conflicts, setup, and payoff.
bookBible.noPlotSubtitle: Add the first promise, mystery, conflict, or payoff.
bookBible.timelineDescription: Connect events to chapters and keep sequence clear.
bookBible.privateNotesDescription: Free-form notes stay beside the structured bible.
bookBible.noNotebookSubtitle: Save a private note or run a Story Studio tool.
bookBible.noSuggestionHistory: No accepted or rejected suggestions yet.

essentials.subtitle: Only the account details that belong on this page.

editor.avatarHint: Square images work best for this space.

reviews.title: My reviews
reviews.subtitle: Your reader notes, kept clean and easy to skim.
reviews.emptySubtitle: Write your first review and it will show up here.
reviews.emptySubtitleSecondary: Once you review books, they will show up here.

public.title: Reader profile
public.subtitle: A public look at this reader's shelf presence.
public.overviewSubtitle: The shared parts of this reader's InkVerse activity.
public.privateSubtitle: {{user}} is only sharing basic profile details right now.
public.commentsSubtitle: Chapter notes this reader has left across the shelf.
public.commentsEmptySubtitle: When this reader comments on chapters, they will appear here.
public.librarySubtitle: Books this reader chose to share from their shelf.
public.libraryEmptySubtitle: Shared library picks will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control privacy, notifications, and reading preferences.
settings.publicProfileHint: Allow other readers to view your profile details.
settings.showReviewsHint: Let other readers see the reviews posted from your profile.
settings.showCommentsHint: Allow readers to browse your public chapter comments.
settings.showAuthorBooksHint: Display books you published if this profile is an author.
settings.showLibraryHint: Share your saved shelf with other readers.
settings.emailUpdatesHint: Receive account and activity updates by email.
settings.readingRemindersHint: Get nudges to continue where you left off.
settings.languageHint: Pick the interface language you want InkVerse to use.

page.resultsSubtitle: Showing {{start}}-{{end}} of {{total}} stories matched to your current shelf.
page.emptyResultsSubtitle: Use the filters to shape a shelf around the exact vibe you want.
page.shapeSubtitle: Use quick tabs for broad lanes, then open the advanced controls when you want something more exact.
page.emptySubtitle: Try removing some filters, searching a different keyword, or exploring other tags.

filters.guide: Tap once to include a chip, twice to exclude it, and a third time to clear it.
filters.activeFiltersHint: Tap any chip to remove it.

page.boardSubtitle: Showing ranks {{start}}-{{end}} out of {{total}} stories in the current board.
page.emptyBoardSubtitle: Switch lanes, narrow the shelf, or open a different time window to populate the board.

page.headTitle: Explore the concepts readers are chasing.
page.headText: Move through themed lanes, spotlighted moods, and curated story worlds shaping what readers open next.
page.emptySubtitle: Curated concepts will appear here once the shelf is ready.
page.libraryText: Showing {{pageCount}} of {{total}} curated trend{{suffix}} on the current shelf.

details.descriptionFallback: Explore this curated collection of stories.
details.toolbarText: Switch the sort lane, then jump into any book connected to this concept.
details.emptySubtitle: This trend does not have any connected books right now.
details.resultsText: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}} books connected to this trend.

synopsis.title: Synopsis
synopsis.subtitle: The core premise, mood, and promise of the story.

rating.title: Ratings
rating.subtitle: A quick read on the overall score and how readers break it down.
rating.liveCopy: Updated live as new reviews come in.
rating.breakdownSubtitle: What reviewers are scoring most closely.

reviews.title: Reader Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Honest reactions, detailed notes, and quick takes from readers.
reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Be the first!

reviewReplies.title: Replies
reviewReplies.loginRequired: You must be logged in to reply.

reader.openingSummary: This chapter opens the shelf and sets the tone for what comes next.
reader.openingFootnote: The opening chapter starts with the story itself, while the side rail keeps navigation and settings close without pulling you out of the page.
reader.openingSubtitle: Start at the first page and let the world settle in.
reader.normalSubtitle: A cleaner reading flow that keeps the chapter doing the work.
reader.drawerCopy: Move through the book without leaving your reading position.

comments.title: Comments
comments.subtitle: Talk about the chapter without leaving the reading flow.
comments.passageSubtitle: Stay on the exact paragraph and react without losing your place.
comments.signInPrompt: Sign in to join the conversation.
comments.emptyParagraph: No comments on this paragraph yet. Be the first to leave one.
comments.emptyChapter: No comments yet. Be the first to leave one.
